creator: norm@mselectron.net
text:
Hello all,

I am sad to inform you that Joe Kelsey unexpectedly passed away on 18 Jan 2011.
He was 55.

I have been handling his email since then, and on the ast-users list there
is a new version of ksh93 (echo $KSH_VERSION gives "Version JM 93u 2011-02-08").

Changeing the line "VERSION=  2010-03-09" to "VERSION=  2011-02-08"
in /usr/ports/shells/ksh93/Makefile and running "make makesum" allows it
to build, and AFAIKT it works properly.

I believe $SOMEONE should make this change to the port and commit it.
I don't trust my patch fu to JustDoIt myself.

I have known Joe for 36 years, and he introduced me to freeBSD in 1999.
I will watch his email for things like this, but I am not sure I know
enough to be the maintainer (even though this one looks easy).

Let me know what people decide.


Regards,
Norm

-- 
Norm Ahlquist
norm@mselectron.net
norm-ksh@zircon.seattle.wa.us
